headline: Darden Restaurants: Reiterate Buy Rating As Demand Outlook Remains Solid
summary: Darden Restaurants (DRI) buy rating: resilient demand, Q3 sales growth, faster new store openings, and margin recovery outlook.

headline: Darden: Decelerating Comps And Inflation Pressures
summary: Darden Restaurants stock is a "Sell" amid slowing same-store sales and commodity inflation. Click here to read an analysis of DRI stock now.
